import uno
from com.sun.star.awt import Size
from com.sun.star.table import BorderLine2
from com.sun.star.style import LineSpacing

doc = services.document.get_active_document()
text = doc.getText()
img = uno.systemPathToFileUrl('C:/Users/david/Pictures/test/Rwanda/PXL_20251031_083528525.jpg')
W, H = 12000, 6700

def no_border(f):
    b = BorderLine2()
    for s in ('TopBorder','BottomBorder','LeftBorder','RightBorder'): f.setPropertyValue(s, b)
    for d in ('TopBorderDistance','BottomBorderDistance','LeftBorderDistance','RightBorderDistance','BorderDistance'): f.setPropertyValue(d, 0)

def title(t, txt):
    c = t.createTextCursorByRange(t.getEnd())
    t.insertControlCharacter(c, 0, False)
    c = t.createTextCursorByRange(t.getEnd())
    c.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 14)
    c.setPropertyValue('CharWeight', 150)
    t.insertString(c, txt, False)
    t.insertControlCharacter(c, 0, False)
    return t.createTextCursorByRange(t.getEnd())

def page_break(t):
    c = t.createTextCursorByRange(t.getEnd())
    t.insertControlCharacter(c, 0, False)
    c = t.createTextCursorByRange(t.getEnd())
    c.setPropertyValue('BreakType', 4)
    return c

was = doc.getPropertyValue('RecordChanges')
doc.setPropertyValue('RecordChanges', False)

# T1: mcp-libre style
c = title(text, 'T1: AT_PARAGRAPH CENTER/TOP')
f = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextFrame')
f.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
f.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 4)
no_border(f)
text.insertTextContent(c, f, False)
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 0)
g.setPropertyValue('HoriOrient', 2)
g.setPropertyValue('VertOrient', 1)
ft = f.getText()
fc = ft.createTextCursor()
ft.insertTextContent(fc, g, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertControlCharacter(cc, 0, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertString(cc, 'Legende T1', False)

page_break(text)

# T2: AS_CHARACTER + CharHeight 1
c = title(text, 'T2: AS_CHARACTER + CharHeight 1')
f = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextFrame')
f.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
f.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 4)
no_border(f)
text.insertTextContent(c, f, False)
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 1)
ft = f.getText()
fc = ft.createTextCursor()
fc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 1)
ft.insertTextContent(fc, g, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertControlCharacter(cc, 0, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
cc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 10)
ft.insertString(cc, 'Legende T2', False)

page_break(text)

# T3: AS_CHAR + LineSpacing min + CharHeight 1 + ParaMargin 0
c = title(text, 'T3: AS_CHAR + tiny line + margin 0')
f = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextFrame')
f.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
f.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 4)
no_border(f)
text.insertTextContent(c, f, False)
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 1)
ft = f.getText()
fc = ft.createTextCursor()
fc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 1)
ls = LineSpacing()
ls.Mode = 0
ls.Height = 1
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaLineSpacing', ls)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaTopMargin', 0)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaBottomMargin', 0)
ft.insertTextContent(fc, g, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertControlCharacter(cc, 0, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
cc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 10)
ft.insertString(cc, 'Legende T3', False)

page_break(text)

# T4: No frame at all
c = title(text, 'T4: No frame - bare image')
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 1)
text.insertTextContent(c, g, False)
c = text.createTextCursorByRange(text.getEnd())
text.insertControlCharacter(c, 0, False)
c = text.createTextCursorByRange(text.getEnd())
text.insertString(c, 'Legende T4', False)

page_break(text)

# T5: AutoHeight frame
c = title(text, 'T5: AutoHeight frame')
f = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextFrame')
f.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
f.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 4)
f.setPropertyValue('FrameIsAutomaticHeight', True)
no_border(f)
text.insertTextContent(c, f, False)
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 1)
ft = f.getText()
fc = ft.createTextCursor()
fc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 1)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaTopMargin', 0)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaBottomMargin', 0)
ft.insertTextContent(fc, g, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertControlCharacter(cc, 0, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
cc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 10)
ft.insertString(cc, 'Legende T5', False)

page_break(text)

# T6: All zero margins + auto height + AT_PARAGRAPH
c = title(text, 'T6: AT_PARA + all zero + auto')
f = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextFrame')
f.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
f.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 4)
f.setPropertyValue('FrameIsAutomaticHeight', True)
f.setPropertyValue('TopMargin', 0)
f.setPropertyValue('BottomMargin', 0)
f.setPropertyValue('LeftMargin', 0)
f.setPropertyValue('RightMargin', 0)
no_border(f)
text.insertTextContent(c, f, False)
g = doc.createInstance('com.sun.star.text.TextGraphicObject')
g.setPropertyValue('GraphicURL', img)
g.setPropertyValue('Size', Size(W, H))
g.setPropertyValue('AnchorType', 0)
g.setPropertyValue('HoriOrient', 0)
g.setPropertyValue('VertOrient', 0)
ft = f.getText()
fc = ft.createTextCursor()
fc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 1)
ls2 = LineSpacing()
ls2.Mode = 0
ls2.Height = 1
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaLineSpacing', ls2)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaTopMargin', 0)
fc.setPropertyValue('ParaBottomMargin', 0)
ft.insertTextContent(fc, g, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
ft.insertControlCharacter(cc, 0, False)
cc = ft.createTextCursorByRange(ft.getEnd())
cc.setPropertyValue('CharHeight', 10)
ft.insertString(cc, 'Legende T6', False)

doc.setPropertyValue('RecordChanges', was)
_result = '6 tests OK'
